positive: A mystical, stylized woodland scene featuring a large, majestic, glowing bioluminescent owl perched on a stylized, cracked moon root. The owl is surrounded by intricate, interwoven elements: glowing ferns, geometric crystalline forest dust, and gentle, upward-flowing swirls of ethereal mist. The color palette should be deep sapphire blues, electric teal, lavender, and glowing emerald green. The style must be high-contrast, vector-illustration quality, clean silhouette, symmetrical composition, suitable for screen printing or embroidery on apparel. Minimalist depth, strong outlines, perfect symmetry, isolated subject on white background or single background color.
negative: blur, low detail, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, cluttered, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photograph, realism, poor lighting
